name: list-questions returns the activated per-namespace probe groups for the classified workload
command: OUT=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "React SPA on Kubernetes with Terraform" --list-questions 2>l.err); echo "$OUT" | grep -q 'probe_groups' && echo "$OUT" | grep -q 'react_rendering_model' && grep -qE 'activated_probes=[1-9]' l.err && echo list-questions-probes 1>&2
